Meet Our Coaching Staff

Five certified instructors. Decades of combined Taekwondo experience, right here in Lawrenceville.

6th Degree Black Belt · Head Instructor & Owner
Head Instructor

Master Hongryong Park

6th Degree Black Belt · Head Instructor & Owner

Master Hongryong Park is the Head Instructor at Ahn's Taekwondo Academy in Lawrenceville, NJ. He is an integral part of Ahn's Taekwondo and was the Head Instructor at the Montgomery location for 14 years. He is one of the youngest Kukkiwon Certified 6th Degree Black Belts. He was a Taekwondo representative athlete of his middle and high school in South Korea, where he was required to train daily for 7 to 8 hours. With sparring as his specialty, Master Park has won numerous Gold Medals in multiple Korean Taekwondo Sparring Tournaments. As well as being an expert in his field, Master Park is incredible with children with his patience and kindness. He puts extra care into each student and knows how to bring out the fun while teaching discipline, focus, respect, and perseverance.

4th Degree Black Belt · Instructor
Senior Instructor

Master Liza Howe

4th Degree Black Belt · Instructor

Master Liza Howe is an instructor at Ahn's Taekwondo Academy in Lawrenceville, NJ. She is a product of our parents program in the Skillman location, and started Taekwondo after her daughter got her 2nd degree black belt. She has been practicing and training in Taekwondo since 2014, and is a Kukkiwon-certified 4th degree black belt. Master Howe grew to love forms and has competed extensively — locally, regionally, nationally, and even in a couple of international competitions. She has been helping in Ahn's classes since 2016, and enjoys teaching all ages.

Our Full Faculty

Every instructor at Ahn's Taekwondo Lawrenceville brings real rank, real experience, and a passion for developing students.

Sophia Cruz
Junior Instructor · 3rd Degree Black Belt
Seohyun Kim
Instructor · 3rd Degree Black Belt

Ready to Train With Us?

Your first class is completely free — no experience required.

Ahn's Taekwondo

Ahn's Taekwondo is Lawrenceville's premier martial arts academy. We develop champions on and off the mats through world-class instruction and a supportive community.
